summary: Media Validation | Litmus tool Search | Valid Input
gherkin:
When the user click on the "Media Validation" tile on the dashboard
And the user inputs a valid query into the "Search for GamePK" box. For example: 747090
Then the user should land on the Media Validation Litmus (current date) page by default
And the user should see the matching GamePK results for the games of that day
!xray-attachment://341ebddb-3f68-4e47-adea-18df4d6fe523|width=780,height=762!
